evals.prompt: Create a new developer user for João Silva.
evals.expected_output: Creates iam/users/joao-silva/ directory with main.tf, variables.tf, outputs.tf. Adds module block to iam/main.tf with developers_group_name. Runs terraform validate and plan. Ends with apply handoff.
expectations: Creates main.tf referencing iam-developer-user module with groups = [var.developers_group_name]
Creates outputs.tf with user_name, user_arn, user_unique_id
Adds module iam_users_joao_silva to iam/main.tf passing developers_group_name

evals.prompt: Add André Costa as both developer and admin.
evals.expected_output: Creates user with both groups. variables.tf declares both developers_group_name and admin_group_name. Module block passes both group variables.
expectations: Creates variables.tf declaring both developers_group_name and admin_group_name
Adds module to iam/main.tf passing both group name variables
